_description: ItemList schema for the roundup page
name: Best Tools to Stop Nail Biting in 2026
description: Ranked comparison of nail biting remedies by clinical evidence — AI detection, bitter polish, HRT, competing response tools.

itemListElement.name: Habit Reversal Training (HRT)
itemListElement.description: Gold standard CBT protocol — 70–90% reduction in biting frequency in clinical trials. Free self-guided or therapist-led.

itemListElement.name: Stop Biting (AI Detection App)
itemListElement.description: Real-time webcam AI detects nail biting and fires an alert. 100% on-device. Free 3-day trial, $2.99/month.

itemListElement.name: Mavala Stop (Bitter Polish)
itemListElement.description: Denatonium benzoate deterrent applied to nails. ~$10 one-time purchase. Works 24/7 including away from screen.

itemListElement.name: Orly No Bite (Bitter Polish)
itemListElement.description: Alternative bitter polish with longer-wear formula. Same mechanism as Mavala Stop. ~$9–11.

itemListElement.name: Competing Response / Fidget Tools
itemListElement.description: Physical objects (fidget rings, textured tools) that occupy hands during high-risk contexts. Best as HRT adjunct.

_description: SoftwareApplication schema for the vs page (Stop Biting side)
name: Stop Biting
description: Web and desktop app (macOS, Windows, PWA) that uses MediaPipe AI to detect nail biting via webcam in real-time. 100% on-device processing. Free 3-day trial.

offers.description: Monthly subscription — $2.99/month or $29/year. Free 3-day trial included.

featureList: Works in browser as PWA — no install needed
